title: Drops Editor
description: DropsEditor is a lightweight plugin that lets you customize block drops with your own items and amounts, plus an optional random drops feature for unique and fun gameplay.
body:
# ⚡ **DropsEditor**

*Release 2.1.1*  
__Lightweight drop editing plugin for Paper 1.20.x - 1.21.x__

---

## 📝 Overview
**DropsEditor** is a lightweight and performance-focused drop management plugin for **Paper 1.20.x - 1.21.x** that allows server owners to **edit block drops**, **control item amounts**, enable **random drops**, and create **custom titles, subtitles, actionbars, and chat messages** — all using simple commands and GUIs.

Random drops challenges.

---

## 🚀 New 2.1.1
✔ In-game GUI system to edit block drops  
✔ Command-based drop editing support  
✔ Random drops system (ON / OFF)  
✔ Per-block drop customization  
✔ Custom item & amount control  
✔ Custom titles, subtitles, actionbars & chat messages  
✔ Hex color code support for titles & messages  

---

## ✨ Features
✅ Ultra-lightweight & performance-optimized  
✅ Fully in-game GUI-based drop editor  
✅ Command-based drop editing system  
✅ Random drops mode for block breaking  
✅ Full control over items and drop counts  
✅ Custom titles system (title, subtitle, actionbar, chat)  
✅ File-based title storage & execution  
✅ Built for 1.20.x - 1.21.x  
✅ **Hex Color Code Support**  

---

## ⌨ Commands
| Command | Description | Usage Examples |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **`/rd <block>`** | Open GUI to edit drops for a block. | `/rd stone` |
| **`/rd <block> <block>`** | Edit block drops via command. | `/rd stone dirt` |
| **`/randomdrops`** | Toggle random drops mode. | `/randomdrops ON`, `/randomdrops OFF` |
| **`/titles`** | Manage custom titles & messages. | `/titles create win`, `/titles execute 1s 3s 1s win @a` |

---

## 🔐 Permissions
| Permission | Description | Default |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `dropseditor.*` | Access to all commands. | `op` |
| `dropseditor.edit` | Edit block drops. | `op` |
| `dropseditor.randomdrops` | Toggle random drops mode. | `op` |
| `dropseditor.titles` | Manage titles & messages. | `op` |

---

## 📥 Installation
1. Download the latest **DropsEditor.jar**.
2. Place it in your `/plugins` folder.
3. Start or restart your server.
4. Configure drops and titles using commands.
5. Enjoy fully customizable drops & messages!

💬 Support & Issues  
Github: [Click Here](https://github.com/SwarajDev5/DropsEditor/issues/)
